title: Frozen land
body:
![logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/30cc07af59c1e5ea4c439fe5b1d81f857d068c60.png)




***One day, there was a sudden drop in temperature on Earth.***

***As the world was covered with snow, a world where life was increasingly difficult to live came.***

***In order to survive in this world, special attention is needed...***




**Features**

>body temperature system
>
>various Crops and food
>
>Lots of different swords and weapons!
>
>structures you can find in world
>
>**...and more things!**
>
>
>
